CustomField.description: Set to true when Element_Description__c was AI-generated or substantially AI-modified. When true and Selected__c = true, nepa_sme_validation_date__c is required before this element can be finalized in the administrative record. Satisfies OMB M-25-21 AI accountability for federal decision elements. Source: NAEP/PNNL 2025 AI Workshop.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This decision element content was AI-assisted. SME validation required before selection.
CustomField.label: AI Assisted Draft
